controls.title: Authorized Access Control
controls.description:
Limit information system access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, or devices (including other information systems).
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.i
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.1
controls.implementationGuidance:
Limit information system access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, or devices (including other information systems).
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.i
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.1

controls.title: Transaction & Function Control
controls.description:
Limit information system access to the types of transactions and functions that authorized users are permitted to execute. 
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.ii
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.2
controls.implementationGuidance:
Limit information system access to the types of transactions and functions that authorized users are permitted to execute. 
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.ii
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.2

controls.title: Control CUI Flow
controls.description:
Control the flow of CUI in accordance with approved authorizations. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.3
controls.implementationGuidance:
Control the flow of CUI in accordance with approved authorizations. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.3

controls.title: Separation of Duties
controls.description:
Separate the duties of individuals to reduce the risk of malevolent activity without collusion.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.4
controls.implementationGuidance:
Separate the duties of individuals to reduce the risk of malevolent activity without collusion.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.4

controls.title: Least Privilege
controls.description:
Employ the principle of least privilege, including for specific security functions and privileged accounts.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.5
controls.implementationGuidance:
Employ the principle of least privilege, including for specific security functions and privileged accounts.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.5

controls.title: Non-Privileged Account Use
controls.description:
Use non-privileged accounts or roles when accessing nonsecurity functions.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.6
controls.implementationGuidance:
Use non-privileged accounts or roles when accessing nonsecurity functions.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.6

controls.title: Privileged Functions
controls.description:
Prevent non-privileged users from executing privileged functions and capture the execution of such functions in audit logs.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.7
controls.implementationGuidance:
Prevent non-privileged users from executing privileged functions and capture the execution of such functions in audit logs.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.7

controls.title: Unsuccessful Logon Attempts
controls.description:
Limit unsuccessful logon attempts.

controls.implementationGuidance:

Provide privacy and security notices consistent with applicable CUI rules.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.1.9

controls.title: Session Lock
controls.description:
Use session lock with pattern-hiding displays to prevent access and viewing of data after a period of inactivity.

controls.implementationGuidance:
Use session lock with pattern-hiding displays to prevent access and viewing of data after a period of inactivity.

controls.description:
Terminate (automatically) a user session after a defined condition.

controls.implementationGuidance:

controls.title: Role-Based Risk Awareness
controls.description:
Ensure that managers, systems administrators, and users of organizational systems are made aware of the security risks associated with their activities and of the applicable policies, standards, and procedures related to the security of those systems.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.2.1
controls.implementationGuidance:
Ensure that managers, systems administrators, and users of organizational systems are made aware of the security risks associated with their activities and of the applicable policies, standards, and procedures related to the security of those systems.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.2.1

controls.description:
Ensure that personnel are trained to carry out their assigned information security-related duties and responsibilities. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.2.2
controls.implementationGuidance:
Ensure that personnel are trained to carry out their assigned information security-related duties and responsibilities. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.2.2

controls.description:

controls.implementationGuidance:

• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.2.3

controls.title: System Auditing
controls.description:
Create and retain system audit logs and records to the extent needed to enable the monitoring, analysis, investigation, and reporting of unlawful or unauthorized system activity. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.3.1
controls.implementationGuidance:
Create and retain system audit logs and records to the extent needed to enable the monitoring, analysis, investigation, and reporting of unlawful or unauthorized system activity. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.3.1

controls.description:
Ensure that the actions of individual system users can be uniquely traced to those users, so they can be held accountable for their actions.
 • NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.3.2
controls.implementationGuidance:
Ensure that the actions of individual system users can be uniquely traced to those users, so they can be held accountable for their actions.
 • NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.3.2

controls.title: Event Review
controls.description:
Review and update logged events.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.3.3
controls.implementationGuidance:
Review and update logged events.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.3.3

controls.description:

controls.description:

controls.implementationGuidance:
Correlate audit record review, analysis, and reporting processes for investigation and response to indications of unlawful, unauthorized, suspicious, or unusual activity.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.3.5

Provide audit record reduction and report generation to support on-demand analysis and reporting.

• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.3.6

controls.description:
Provide a system capability that compares and synchronizes internal system clocks with an authoritative source to generate time stamps for audit records.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.3.7
controls.implementationGuidance:

Protect audit information and audit logging tools from unauthorized access, modification, and deletion.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.3.8

controls.description:

Employ the principle of least functionality by configuring organizational systems to provide only essential capabilities.

controls.title: Application Execution Policy
controls.description:
Apply deny-by-exception (blacklisting) policy to prevent the use of unauthorized software or deny-all, permit-by-exception (whitelisting) policy to allow the execution of authorized software.

Apply deny-by-exception (blacklisting) policy to prevent the use of unauthorized software or deny-all, permit-by-exception (whitelisting) policy to allow the execution of authorized software.

controls.description:

controls.title: Security Control Assessment
controls.description:
Periodically assess the security controls in organizational systems to determine if the controls are effective in their application. 
 • NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.12.1
controls.implementationGuidance:
Periodically assess the security controls in organizational systems to determine if the controls are effective in their application. 
 • NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.12.1

controls.title: Plan of Action
controls.description:
Develop and implement plans of action designed to correct deficiencies and reduce or eliminate vulnerabilities in organizational systems.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.12.2
controls.implementationGuidance:
Develop and implement plans of action designed to correct deficiencies and reduce or eliminate vulnerabilities in organizational systems.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.12.2

controls.title: Security Control Monitoring
controls.description:
Monitor security controls on an ongoing basis to ensure the continued effectiveness of the controls. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.12.3
controls.implementationGuidance:
Monitor security controls on an ongoing basis to ensure the continued effectiveness of the controls. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.12.3

controls.title: System Security Plan
controls.description:
Develop, document, and periodically update system security plans that describe system boundaries, system environments of operation, how security requirements are implemented, and the relationships with or connections to other systems. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.12.4
controls.implementationGuidance:
Develop, document, and periodically update system security plans that describe system boundaries, system environments of operation, how security requirements are implemented, and the relationships with or connections to other systems. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.12.4

controls.title: Boundary Protection
controls.description:
Monitor, control, and protect organizational communications (i.e., information transmitted or received by organizational information systems) at the external boundaries and key internal boundaries of the information systems.
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.x
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.1
controls.implementationGuidance:
Monitor, control, and protect organizational communications (i.e., information transmitted or received by organizational information systems) at the external boundaries and key internal boundaries of the information systems.
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.x
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.1

controls.title: Security Engineering
controls.description:
Employ architectural designs, software development techniques, and systems engineering principles that promote effective information security within organizational systems.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.2
controls.implementationGuidance:
Employ architectural designs, software development techniques, and systems engineering principles that promote effective information security within organizational systems.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.2

controls.title: Role Separation
controls.description:
Separate user functionality from system management functionality. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.3
controls.implementationGuidance:
Separate user functionality from system management functionality. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.3

controls.title: Shared Resource Control
controls.description:
Prevent unauthorized and unintended information transfer via shared system resources. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.4
controls.implementationGuidance:
Prevent unauthorized and unintended information transfer via shared system resources. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.4

controls.title: Public-Access System Separation
controls.description:
Implement subnetworks for publicly accessible system components that are physically or logically separated from internal networks.
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.xi
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.5
controls.implementationGuidance:
Implement subnetworks for publicly accessible system components that are physically or logically separated from internal networks.
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.xi
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.5

controls.title: Network Communication by Exception
controls.description:
Deny network communications traffic by default and allow network communications traffic by exception (i.e., deny all, permit by exception).
 • NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.6
controls.implementationGuidance:
Deny network communications traffic by default and allow network communications traffic by exception (i.e., deny all, permit by exception).
 • NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.6

controls.title: Split Tunneling
controls.description:
Prevent remote devices from simultaneously establishing non-remote connections with organizational systems and communicating via some other connection to resources in external networks (i.e., split tunneling). 
 • NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.7
controls.implementationGuidance:
Prevent remote devices from simultaneously establishing non-remote connections with organizational systems and communicating via some other connection to resources in external networks (i.e., split tunneling). 
 • NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.7

controls.title: Data in Transit
controls.description:
Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure of CUI during transmission unless otherwise protected by alternative physical safeguards.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.8
controls.implementationGuidance:
Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure of CUI during transmission unless otherwise protected by alternative physical safeguards.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.8

controls.title: Connections Termination
controls.description:
Terminate network connections associated with communications sessions at the end of the sessions or after a defined period of inactivity. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.9
controls.implementationGuidance:
Terminate network connections associated with communications sessions at the end of the sessions or after a defined period of inactivity. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.9

controls.title: Key Management
controls.description:
Establish and manage cryptographic keys for cryptography employed in organizational systems. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.10
controls.implementationGuidance:
Establish and manage cryptographic keys for cryptography employed in organizational systems. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.10

controls.title: CUI Encryption
controls.description:
Employ FIPS-validated cryptography when used to protect the confidentiality of CUI. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.11
controls.implementationGuidance:
Employ FIPS-validated cryptography when used to protect the confidentiality of CUI. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.11

controls.title: Collaborative Device Control
controls.description:
Prohibit remote activation of collaborative computing devices and provide indication of devices in use to users present at the device. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.12
controls.implementationGuidance:
Prohibit remote activation of collaborative computing devices and provide indication of devices in use to users present at the device. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.12

controls.title: Mobile Code
controls.description:
Control and monitor the use of mobile code. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.13
controls.implementationGuidance:
Control and monitor the use of mobile code. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.13

controls.title: Voice over Internet Protocol
controls.description:
Control and monitor the use of Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP) technologies.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.14
controls.implementationGuidance:
Control and monitor the use of Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP) technologies.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.14

controls.title: Communications Authenticity
controls.description:
Protect the authenticity of communications sessions.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.15
controls.implementationGuidance:
Protect the authenticity of communications sessions.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.15

controls.title: Data at Rest
controls.description:
Protect the confidentiality of CUI at rest.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.16
controls.implementationGuidance:
Protect the confidentiality of CUI at rest.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.13.16

controls.title: Flaw Remediation
controls.description:
Identify, report, and correct information and information system flaws in a timely manner.
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.xii
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.1
controls.implementationGuidance:
Identify, report, and correct information and information system flaws in a timely manner.
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.xii
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.1

controls.title: Malicious Code Protection
controls.description:
Provide protection from malicious code at appropriate locations within organizational information systems.
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.xiii
 • NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.2
controls.implementationGuidance:
Provide protection from malicious code at appropriate locations within organizational information systems.
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.xiii
 • NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.2

controls.title: Security Alerts & Advisories
controls.description:
Monitor system security alerts and advisories and take action in response.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.3
controls.implementationGuidance:
Monitor system security alerts and advisories and take action in response.
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.3

controls.title: Update Malicious Code Protection
controls.description:
Update malicious code protection mechanisms when new releases are available.
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.xiv
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.4
controls.implementationGuidance:
Update malicious code protection mechanisms when new releases are available.
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.xiv
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.4

controls.title: System & File Scanning
controls.description:
Perform periodic scans of the information system and real-time scans of files from external sources as files are downloaded, opened, or executed.
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.xv
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.5
controls.implementationGuidance:
Perform periodic scans of the information system and real-time scans of files from external sources as files are downloaded, opened, or executed.
• FAR Clause 52.204-21 b.1.xv
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.5

controls.title: Monitor Communications for Attacks
controls.description:
Monitor organizational systems, including inbound and outbound communications traffic, to detect attacks and indicators of potential attacks.
 • NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.6
controls.implementationGuidance:
Monitor organizational systems, including inbound and outbound communications traffic, to detect attacks and indicators of potential attacks.
 • NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.6

controls.title: Identify Unauthorized Use
controls.description:
Identify unauthorized use of organizational systems. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.7
controls.implementationGuidance:
Identify unauthorized use of organizational systems. 
• NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 3.14.7
